case_title: SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. VS. DOUGLAS SIDNEY JONES et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
